metadata.description: Evidence-based multi-engine OCR for Apple Silicon — MCP server with tier-disciplined recommendations

plugins.name: bestocr
plugins.description: bestOCR for agents: the bestocr-mcp MCP server (multi-engine OCR over stdio — ocr/recommend/list_engines/list_models plus async job polling, notarized binary auto-downloaded on install). Engines: Apple Vision, tesseract, rapidocr/cnocr/surya adapters, Ollama VLMs (GLM-OCR, OvisOCR2, PaddleOCR-VL). recommend answers are evidence-labelled — tier-named rankings or an honest evidence-pending capability filter.
